options.content: $last_seen_hour $last_seen_date

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time_index AS "time",
  entity_id,
  CASE status
    WHEN 'free' THEN 0
    WHEN 'occupied' THEN 1
  END AS status_num,
  CAST(-47.064251959883066 AS DOUBLE) AS lon,
  CAST(-22.81476512075327 AS DOUBLE) AS lat
FROM etparkingspot
WHERE entity_id = 'urn:ngsi-ld:ParkingSpot:IC2-000'
  AND time_index = (
    SELECT MAX(time_index)
    FROM etparkingspot
    WHERE entity_id = 'urn:ngsi-ld:ParkingSpot:IC2-000'
  )

UNION ALL

options.content: $free_general_spots

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time_index AS "time",
  FLOOR(CAST(availablespotnumber AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / 14.0) AS free_percentage
FROM etparkinggroup
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time_index) AND entity_id = 'urn:ngsi-ld:ParkingGroup:IC2-Staff'
ORDER BY 1,2

options.content: $free_disabled_spots

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time_index AS "time",
  FLOOR(CAST(availablespotnumber AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / 2.0) AS free_percentage
FROM etparkinggroup
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time_index) AND entity_id = 'urn:ngsi-ld:ParkingGroup:IC2-Staff-DisabledOnly'
ORDER BY 1,2

panels.title: % of Available Free Spots - Disabled Only

list.name: last_seen_hour

list.definition:
SELECT
  availablespotnumber
FROM etparkinggroup
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time_index)
  AND entity_id = 'urn:ngsi-ld:ParkingGroup:IC2-Staff-DisabledOnly'
ORDER BY time_index DESC
LIMIT 1;
list.name: free_disabled_spots
list.query:
SELECT
  availablespotnumber
FROM etparkinggroup
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time_index)
  AND entity_id = 'urn:ngsi-ld:ParkingGroup:IC2-Staff-DisabledOnly'
ORDER BY time_index DESC
LIMIT 1;

list.definition:
SELECT
  availablespotnumber AS free_general_spots
FROM etparkinggroup
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time_index)
  AND entity_id = 'urn:ngsi-ld:ParkingGroup:IC2-Staff'
ORDER BY time_index DESC
LIMIT 1;
list.name: free_general_spots
list.query:
SELECT
  availablespotnumber AS free_general_spots
FROM etparkinggroup
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time_index)
  AND entity_id = 'urn:ngsi-ld:ParkingGroup:IC2-Staff'
ORDER BY time_index DESC
LIMIT 1;

list.name: last_seen_date
